title: Organic Lavender Essential Oil 100ml – Pure, Undiluted, Long-Lasting Aroma – Small Batch, Therapeutic Grade for Aromatherapy, Skincare, Massage & Cleaning
features: 100% Pure & Undiluted: Premium organic lavender essential oil with no fillers or additives—sourced directly from our own farm.
Certified Organic: Free from pesticides and synthetic chemicals, ensuring a clean, safe oil you can trust for your family and home.
Long-Lasting Scent: Enjoy a fresh, calming lavender aroma that lingers—perfect for relaxing environments and daily use.
Multi-Purpose Use: Ideal for aromatherapy, massage, skin and hair care, sleep support, natural cleaning, and more.
Small Batch Quality: Handcrafted and hand poured in small batches to ensure consistent purity, potency, and the highest standards of production.
description: Product description Experience the calming, therapeutic power of nature with our 100ml Organic Lavender Essential Oil. Sourced directly from our eco-conscious farm in Bulgaria, this essential oil is steam-distilled from the finest lavender flowers and bottled without any dilution, ensuring maximum potency and purity. Certified organic and free from synthetic chemicals, our lavender oil is perfect for a wide variety of uses—from soothing aromatherapy sessions and skincare routines to natural household cleaning solutions. The long-lasting scent creates a peaceful atmosphere while promoting relaxation and well-being. Crafted in small batches and hand poured for top-tier quality control, our oil is a trusted choice for individuals and professionals seeking high-grade, natural solutions. Whether you're enhancing your home spa, making DIY beauty products, or looking for a natural sleep aid, our lavender oil is a pure and powerful option. Please note that this product is intended for external use only and should be used with caution, especially around children and pets. How to Use – DIY Recipes with Lavender Oil Enhance your daily routine with these simple, effective ways to use our 100% pure organic lavender essential oil: 🌙 Relaxing Sleep Spray Create a calming bedtime atmosphere. Ingredients: 10 drops lavender oil 1/2 cup distilled water 1 tbsp witch hazel Instructions: Mix in a spray bottle. Shake well and spritz lightly on pillows and sheets before sleep. 🛁 Stress Relief Bath Soak Soothe your body and mind after a long day. Ingredients: 5–10 drops lavender oil 1 cup Epsom salts Instructions: Add both to a warm bath. Soak for 20 minutes to ease tension and promote relaxation. 💆‍♀️ Nourishing Face Steam Open pores and refresh your skin naturally. Ingredients: 3–4 drops lavender oil Bowl of hot water Instructions: Add oil to steaming water, lean over with a towel covering your head, and inhale for 5–10 minutes. 🧼 Natural Surface Cleaner Clean and freshen your home without harsh chemicals. Ingredients: 15 drops lavender oil 1/2 cup white vinegar 1 cup water Instructions: Combine in a spray bottle. Use on countertops, sinks, and more for a safe, fresh clean. 💆‍♂️ Massage Oil Blend Perfect for relaxation and skin nourishment. Ingredients: 5 drops lavender oil 2 tbsp carrier oil (like coconut or jojoba) Instructions: Mix and apply to shoulders, neck, or feet for a soothing massage experience. Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
